factor_cn: 体力活动没有持续增加
factor_en: Insufficient increase in physical activity or energy expenditure
original_row_name: Increase in physical activity level, energy expenditure, leisure time activity at follow-up
notes: 方向统一为缺少增加会提高维持失败风险；16/21由76.2%还原

factor_cn: 未持续降低总能量摄入
factor_en: Failure to reduce energy intake or energy density
original_row_name: Decrease or reduction in energy intake, energy density, calories (liquid or solid)

factor_cn: 不经常称重或监测体重
original_row_name: Weekly data reports completed, being frequently weighed in trial, frequent self-weighing/monitoring body weight

factor_cn: 未减少甜食油炸快餐等不健康食品
original_row_name: Cut unhealthy food (cut sweet/junk food, decreased fried food consumption, decrease fast food consumption, decrease dessert consumption) during weight loss and maintenance
notes: 原文7篇研究包含8次方向判断；研究篇数与判断次数不得混淆

factor_en: Failure to increase fruit and vegetable consumption
original_row_name: Change in fruit and vegetable consumption, increase
Change in consumption of sugar-sweetened beverages, coffee and tea with sugar, and juice, decrease

factor_cn: 运动自我效能低或感到运动障碍大
factor_en: Low exercise self-efficacy or high perceived exercise barriers
original_row_name: Self-efficacy for exercise and exercise barriers (high) during weight loss and maintenance
notes: 原表正向因素统一改写为失败因素；4/5支持

factor_cn: 暴食情绪性或失控性进食
original_row_name: Binge eating, uncontrolled eating, emotional eating during weight loss and maintenance
notes: 原表为负向预测；统一方向后4/5支持失败风险

factor_en: Failure to control portions or reduce amount of food
original_row_name: Portion control and reducing the amount of food during weight loss and maintenance

factor_cn: 没有降低膳食脂肪摄入
factor_en: Failure to reduce dietary fat intake
Failure to self-monitor exercise or use a pedometer
original_row_name: Self-monitoring exercise, use of a pedometer
Self-efficacy for weight management and perceived difficulty weight management during weight loss maintenance
Self-efficacy for diet during weight loss maintenance

factor_cn: 内在线索引起的失控进食严重
notes: 原表为负向预测；统一方向后2/2支持失败风险
